headline: Vita Coco, B&G Foods, Energizer, Kimberly-Clark, and Clorox Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East sparked a surge in oil prices and stoked fears of a wider economic conflict, as Trump warned the conflict could last up to a month.

headline: Is Kimberly-Clark Reshaping Its Cost Structure Through Productivity?
summary: KMB leans on productivity gains to counter pricing and tariff pressures, reshaping its cost structure under a sweeping transformation plan.
